kicker: The Verdict · Filed from NQ, M1
name: Chobble
body: A small, principled Manchester studio that builds proper web software for people who are tired of the other kind. They write code that still works in a decade. They charge fairly. They tell you when your idea needs rethinking.
If the four questions above told us anything, it's that you're after someone who takes the craft seriously — and Chobble is the name that keeps coming up.
quote: "The right developer is the one who'll still pick up the phone in year three."
